top.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali

top.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
top.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

top.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
top.summary: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

top.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
top.summary: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.

top.title: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
top.summary: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.

top.title: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
top.summary: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
